title: Wakfu Mod By Saylie
description:
⚠️THE CURRENT PRE-ALPHA VERSION IS FULL OF BUGS AND ALMOST EMPTY, SRY!!!!⚠️

A mod minecraft based on the french anime "Wakfu". A mod created by a true fan for true fans of this univer. 

Enjoy 😁
body:
*** ***

** Need Geckolib 3.0.31

*** *** ### **A Wakfu Mod for Minecraft 1.12.2**  ✨ Dive into the magical world of   anime nammed "Wakfu" but right inside Minecraft! ✨ This mod brings epic classes, spell-slinging combat, and a whole new RPG adventure to your blocky world. **What Awaits You Inside:** 🎮      * **🎭 Epic Wakfu Classes:** Become a mighty **Iop** 🗡️, a mystical **Eliatrope** 🌌, a cunning **Sadida** 🌿, or a sharp-shooting **Cra** 🏹! Each class has its own look, style, and awesome powers.   * **💥 Dynamic Skill Combat:** Unlock crazy skills, mix and match them in a radial menu, and unleash them in battle! Manage your **Wakfu** 💠 and **Stamina** 🔋 to become a true hero.   * **📈 True RPG Progression:** Level up, get stronger 💪, and customize your stats your way. Every level makes you more powerful!   * **💰 Kama Economy:** Earn, craft, and trade with the iconic **Kama** currency 💰. Buy cool stuff from NPCs and become a rich adventurer   * **🚀 Start Your Journey:** Create your unique hero from the very first login! Your epic story starts with a choice of your destiny. ![Selection de class](https://i.ibb.co/5WysmhKS/2026-03-31-11-36-37.png%22) ![Selection Eniripsa](https://i.ibb.co/20xy7XNT/2026-05-20-23-46-12.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372926/description_dae3a021-07ef-4fd0-b975-441f1c5e1549.png) ![xelor](https://i.ibb.co/67F1Ksz1/2026-05-17-15-20-06.png)  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372926/description_8ecd0a0b-be4c-449e-84db-c21e6f30917d.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372926/description_861734bc-6a2d-4bd3-bd53-ad1196d090b2.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372926/description_11bbf598-82a3-4000-9b7a-e16b4835d125.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372926/description_01beebc1-08c5-42ca-a507-3cf07e5637fc.png) ![dragodinde](https://i.ibb.co/6RmM9Mbz/dragodinde.gif) ![roublard](https://i.ibb.co/qML3jtjj/roublard.gif) ![Flying Eniripsa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f1d62ce472acd301e096595f47c31d15f7e3946.png) ![Mon ruby !!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83e5826870c866868956b33b5c43a7b9aea6683a.png) ![dofus elitrope](https://i.ibb.co/b50MVzZJ/les-6-dofus-eliatropes-java.gif) ![wesh ?!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7339a543cf65c62bfbc500b3de7d0e5b28ed59d6_0.webp) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372926/description_86e969f0-8787-4d80-ab74-f0bfc0e7f45e.webp) ![sacrés stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7301f8123c0d9f8bc274e8d20468529ae905da0a_0.webp)  

![Ready to join ?!!!!](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fb985ae8-db58-48d2-8cbf-db6333d6e610.png)_" …So, r u ready to join ?"_ 

   *** ***
